description: Slide matching number tiles together to double their value. Can you combine your way up to the legendary 2048 tile in this timeless grid-addictive puzzle?
controls: Arrow Keys / WASD: Slide tiles in all four directions
R: Restart the current session

title: Hextris
description: Rotate the central hexagon to match falling colored bars. Stack three or more blocks of the same color on a face to clear them and prevent the hex from filling up!
controls: Left & Right Arrows / AD: Rotate hexagon counter-clockwise/clockwise
Down Arrow / S: Instant drop the block

title: Pac-Man Doodle
description: The official 30th-anniversary interactive Google doodle of the beloved Pac-Man arcade. Escape the colorful ghosts Blinky, Pinky, Inky, and Clyde while eating dots!
controls: Arrow Keys / WASD: Control Pac-Man's movement
Enter / Click: Start / Insert Coin

title: React Tetris
description: A high-fidelity retro Tetris experience with clean neon graphics, keyboard inputs, sound controls, and precise tetronimo drop physics.
controls: Left / Right Arrow: Move Tetronimo
Up Arrow / X: Rotate Clockwise
Z: Rotate Counter-Clockwise
Spacebar: Hard Drop
Down Arrow: Soft Drop

title: T-Rex Dino Runner
description: The classic Chrome offline Easter egg game. Control the running T-Rex as it dodges cacti and swooping pterodactyls in an endless desert scroll.
controls: Spacebar / Up Arrow: Jump up over obstacles
Down Arrow: Duck under flying dinosaurs

title: Sandspiel
description: An interactive falling-sand physics playground. Mix materials like sand, water, fire, lava, plants, and wind, and watch real-time chemical reactions unfold.
controls: Left Click / Drag: Draw selected element
Material Toolbar: Click to select material type
C: Clear canvas to start fresh

title: Floppy Bird
description: Flap your wings to fly through narrow pipe gaps! A popular unblocked open-source recreate of Flappy Bird that tests your rhythm, timing, and patience.
controls: Spacebar / Click: Flap wings and gain altitude
Click to restart after a crash

title: Classic Minesweeper
description: The retro Windows OS classic. Clear a gridded minefield without detonating a single bomb. Use numerical hints on tiles to locate hidden danger spots.
controls: Left Click: Reveal grid tile contents
Right Click / Alt+Click: Place or remove a warning flag
Click Smile Emoji: Reset and load a new board

title: Tower Bridge Blaster
description: Test your timing and precision by stacking heavy block layers perfectly on top of each other. Keep the tower stable as the stacks rise to the limit!
controls: Left Click / Spacebar: Drop the sliding block onto the tower base
Ensure block falls directly on the layer below

title: Asteroids Vector
description: Command a small triangular ship in an outer space asteroid field. Fire lasers and destroy tumbling rocks before they crash into your thruster shield.
controls: Left / Right Arrow: Rotate ship
Up Arrow / W: Accelerate forward with thruster booster
Spacebar: Fire laser blasters
Shift: Hyper-space teleport
